prompt:
{
  "subject": "Use the uploaded user image as the exact facial and identity reference. {argument name=\"subject description\" default=\"Young South Asian man with thick voluminous curly dark hair, defined eyebrows, warm medium skin tone, trimmed beard, sharp jawline, confident expression, looking directly into camera\"}. Preserve facial structure and realism from the user image.",
  
  "scene": "{argument name=\"scene description\" default=\"High-energy urban magazine cover inspired by modern streetwear culture. The subject stands in an aggressive close-up perspective pose with both hands reaching toward the camera, creating dramatic depth and motion. Vibrant orange monochrome backdrop with layered graffiti doodles, hand-drawn symbols, brush textures, scribbles, crowns, stars, lightning marks, and expressive editorial typography filling the frame\"}.",
  
  "wardrobe": "Bright orange oversized streetwear puffer jacket layered over a black t-shirt, silver rings, subtle chain accessories, modern youth fashion aesthetic.",
  
  "composition": "Extreme close-up magazine cover framing, wide-angle perspective distortion on hands, subject centered, hands blurred slightly in foreground for depth, face sharp and detailed, cinematic editorial layout, dynamic asymmetrical typography placement, cover-style visual hierarchy.",
  
  "text_elements": {
    "main_title": "{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"STREETWAVE\"}",
    "headline": "TURNING HUSTLE INTO ART",
    "side_texts": [
      "STREET ENERGY.",
      "CREATE NOISE.",
      "NO RULES."
    ],
    "footer_text": "REAL CULTURE. REAL PEOPLE. REAL STORIES."
  },
  
  "style": "Ultra-realistic cinematic streetwear editorial photography, high-fashion magazine cover aesthetic, gritty urban energy, modern Gen-Z creative culture, raw artistic vibe, bold visual storytelling, expressive handcrafted graphics, premium social media campaign quality.",
  
  "lighting": "Dramatic warm cinematic lighting, soft diffused key light on face, rich orange ambient glow, high contrast shadows, glossy skin highlights, studio-quality editorial lighting.",
  
  "camera": {
    "angle": "Low-angle close-up shot",
    "lens": "24mm wide-angle lens",
    "focus": "Sharp focus on face with shallow depth of field",
    "quality": "Photorealistic, ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic hair strands, crisp editorial finish"
  },
  
  "background": "Bright textured orange backdrop with painted brush strokes, layered graffiti graphics, hand-drawn doodles, magazine design elements, urban art textures.",
  
  "color_palette": [
    "Vibrant orange",
    "Black",
    "Cream",
    "Warm skin tones"
  ],
  "aspect_ratio": "4:5",
  "negative_prompt": [
    "blurry face",
    "extra fingers",
    "deformed hands",
